requirement_topic.en: Motor Efficiency Classes (IE Code) — SANS 60034 / IEC 60034-30-1
requirement_topic.zh: 电动机效率等级（IE代码）——SANS 60034 / IEC 60034-30-1
requirement_topic.zht: 電動機效率等級（IE代碼）——SANS 60034 / IEC 60034-30-1

summary.en: South Africa adopts IEC 60034 as SANS 60034 through SABS. IEC 60034-30-1:2014 defines IE1–IE4 efficiency classes for line-operated AC motors. South Africa's Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) policy direction under the Department of Energy (DoE) requires IE2 as the minimum efficiency class for motors in scope; IE3 is the recommended direction for future procurement and energy-saving labelling. SABS certification mark (voluntary but widely market-expected) may be obtained against SANS 60034 for motors placed on the South African market. The grid operates at 400/230 V (3-phase), 50 Hz — the 50 Hz base is shared with IEC classes, though rated voltage differs from China's 380 V.
summary.zh: 南非通过SABS将IEC 60034采纳为SANS 60034。IEC 60034-30-1:2014定义线路供电交流电机的IE1–IE4能效等级。南非能源部（DoE）最低能效标准（MEPS）政策方向要求适用范围内电机达到IE2最低能效等级；IE3为未来采购及节能认证的推荐方向。针对南非市场的电机，SABS认证标志（自愿性但市场广泛期望）可依据SANS 60034申请。电网为400/230 V（三相）、50 Hz——50 Hz基础与IEC等级一致，但额定电压与中国380 V不同。
summary.zht: 南非通過SABS將IEC 60034採納為SANS 60034。IEC 60034-30-1:2014定義線路供電交流電機的IE1–IE4能效等級。南非能源部（DoE）最低能效標準（MEPS）政策方向要求適用範圍內電機達到IE2最低能效等級；IE3為未來採購及節能認證的推薦方向。針對南非市場的電機，SABS認證標誌（自願性但市場廣泛期望）可依據SANS 60034申請。電網為400/230 V（三相）、50 Hz——50 Hz基礎與IEC等級一致，但額定電壓與中國380 V不同。

standards_or_laws: South Africa DoE MEPS policy (IE2 minimum direction)

summary.en: China uses GB 18613-2020 (Energy Efficiency Limits and Energy Efficiency Grades of Motors), defining IE1–IE4 grades aligned in naming with IEC 60034-30-1:2014 but with distinct numeric limit values. GB 18613-2020 mandates IE3 as the minimum for most three-phase induction motors from 2021-06-01. China's grid is 380/220 V (3-phase), 50 Hz — same frequency as South Africa but 20 V lower in 3-phase voltage. CCC certification covers motors below 1 kV within its scope but is not recognised by NRCS or SABS as a substitute for South African conformity requirements.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 18613-2020《电动机能效限定值及能效等级》，定义与IEC 60034-30-1:2014命名对应的IE1–IE4能效等级，但具体限值不同。GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多数三相感应电动机最低达到IE3。中国电网为380/220 V（三相）、50 Hz——与南非频率相同但三相电压低20 V。CCC认证覆盖1 kV以下范围内的电机，但NRCS和SABS不将其认可为南非合规要求的替代证明。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 18613-2020《電動機能效限定值及能效等級》，定義與IEC 60034-30-1:2014命名對應的IE1–IE4能效等級，但具體限值不同。GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多數三相感應電動機最低達到IE3。中國電網為380/220 V（三相）、50 Hz——與南非頻率相同但三相電壓低20 V。CCC認證覆蓋1 kV以下範圍內的電機，但NRCS和SABS不將其認可為南非合規要求的替代證明。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification — not recognised in South Africa)

gap.en: South Africa's MEPS direction requires IE2 minimum; China mandates IE3 minimum under GB 18613-2020, so most current Chinese motors nominally meet or exceed the South African MEPS floor. However, the numeric limit values in GB 18613-2020 and IEC 60034-30-1:2014 are not identical for all power/pole combinations, and SANS 60034 (IEC 60034) is the applicable standard in South Africa — not GB 18613. Additionally, voltage re-rating may be needed (380 V CN vs 400 V ZA) and NRCS LoA is required before import or sale where the motor falls under a compulsory specification. CCC is not a recognised credential.
gap.zh: 南非MEPS方向要求IE2最低等级；中国GB 18613-2020强制IE3最低，因此大多数现行中国电机在名义上达到或超过南非MEPS门槛。但GB 18613-2020与IEC 60034-30-1:2014在不同功率/极数组合下的具体限值并不完全一致，且南非适用标准为SANS 60034（IEC 60034），而非GB 18613。此外，可能需要重新额定电压（中国380 V vs 南非400 V），属于强制规范范围的电机进口或销售前须取得NRCS LoA。CCC不被认可。
gap.zht: 南非MEPS方向要求IE2最低等級；中國GB 18613-2020強制IE3最低，因此大多數現行中國電機在名義上達到或超過南非MEPS門檻。但GB 18613-2020與IEC 60034-30-1:2014在不同功率/極數組合下的具體限值並不完全一致，且南非適用標準為SANS 60034（IEC 60034），而非GB 18613。此外，可能需要重新額定電壓（中國380 V vs 南非400 V），屬於強制規範範圍的電機進口或銷售前須取得NRCS LoA。CCC不被認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (NRCS LoA required before import/sale for motors in scope of compulsory specification; MEPS IE2 direction under DoE policy; SABS SANS 60034 is the applicable technical standard)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 is a compulsory national standard enforced by SAMR from 2021-06-01

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A motor bearing only GB 18613-2020 IE3 certification is not automatically compliant with South African requirements. The NRCS LoA is the key import gate for motors in scope of a compulsory specification; SANS 60034 (IEC 60034) is the applicable technical standard, not GB 18613; voltage re-rating from 380 V to 400 V should be verified; and CCC is not recognised. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有GB 18613-2020 IE3认证的电动机不能自动视为符合南非要求。NRCS LoA是强制规范范围内电机进口的关键门槛；适用技术标准为SANS 60034（IEC 60034），而非GB 18613；需核验从380 V到400 V的电压重新额定；CCC不被认可。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有GB 18613-2020 IE3認證的電動機不能自動視為符合南非要求。NRCS LoA是強制規範範圍內電機進口的關鍵門檻；適用技術標準為SANS 60034（IEC 60034），而非GB 18613；需核驗從380 V到400 V的電壓重新額定；CCC不被認可。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Voltage and Grid Compatibility — 400 V / 50 Hz (South Africa vs 380 V / 50 Hz China)
requirement_topic.zh: 电压与电网兼容性——400 V / 50 Hz（南非）vs 380 V / 50 Hz（中国）
requirement_topic.zht: 電壓與電網相容性——400 V / 50 Hz（南非）vs 380 V / 50 Hz（中國）

summary.en: South Africa's standard grid supply is 400/230 V (3-phase/single-phase), 50 Hz, regulated by NERSA (National Energy Regulator of South Africa). SANS 60034-1 (IEC 60034-1) defines voltage tolerance bands for motors. Motors rated for 380 V (standard Chinese industrial grid) must be re-rated or verified to operate within the IEC tolerance band at 400 V before being placed on the South African market. NERSA oversees grid connection standards and utility compliance; motors connected to the national grid must meet grid interface requirements.
summary.zh: 南非标准电网供电为400/230 V（三相/单相）、50 Hz，由NERSA（南非国家能源监管局）监管。SANS 60034-1（IEC 60034-1）定义电机的电压容差范围。按中国标准工业电网380 V额定的电机，在进入南非市场前须重新额定或验证能在IEC容差范围内以400 V运行。NERSA监督电网接入标准及公用事业合规；接入国家电网的电机须满足电网接口要求。
summary.zht: 南非標準電網供電為400/230 V（三相/單相）、50 Hz，由NERSA（南非國家能源監管局）監管。SANS 60034-1（IEC 60034-1）定義電機的電壓容差範圍。按中國標準工業電網380 V額定的電機，在進入南非市場前須重新額定或驗證能在IEC容差範圍內以400 V運行。NERSA監督電網接入標準及公用事業合規；接入國家電網的電機須滿足電網接口要求。

standards_or_laws: SANS 60034-1 (IEC 60034-1 adopted — Rotating electrical machines: rating and performance)
NERSA grid connection and distribution standards

summary.en: China's standard industrial grid is 380/220 V (3-phase/single-phase), 50 Hz. Motors manufactured for the Chinese market are typically rated 380 V. GB 755-2019 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) governs ratings and performance. The 50 Hz frequency matches South Africa, but the 20 V difference in 3-phase voltage (380 V CN vs 400 V ZA) means a standard Chinese motor must be confirmed operable at 400 V — IEC 60034-1 specifies ±10% voltage tolerance, so a 380 V motor operated at 400 V (+5.3%) is technically within tolerance, but thermal and performance verification is advisable.
summary.zh: 中国标准工业电网为380/220 V（三相/单相）、50 Hz。面向中国市场制造的电机通常额定为380 V。GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）规范电机额定值和性能。频率与南非相同（50 Hz），但三相电压相差20 V（中国380 V vs 南非400 V）——IEC 60034-1规定±10%电压容差，因此380 V电机在400 V下运行（+5.3%）技术上在容差范围内，但建议进行热性能核验。
summary.zht: 中國標準工業電網為380/220 V（三相/單相）、50 Hz。面向中國市場製造的電機通常額定為380 V。GB 755-2019（等同IEC 60034-1）規範電機額定值和性能。頻率與南非相同（50 Hz），但三相電壓相差20 V（中國380 V vs 南非400 V）——IEC 60034-1規定±10%電壓容差，因此380 V電機在400 V下運行（+5.3%）技術上在容差範圍內，但建議進行熱性能核驗。

gap.en: The 50 Hz frequency is identical, eliminating the frequency gap. However, a Chinese motor rated 380 V must be verified for 400 V operation; while IEC tolerance bands may cover this, South African buyers and NRCS assessors will expect 400 V nameplate rating or documented verification. Motors nameplated at 380 V only may face NRCS LoA complications or buyer rejection. Re-rating to 400 V dual-voltage (e.g., 380–420 V range) is the common commercial solution.
gap.zh: 50 Hz频率完全一致，无频率差距。但额定380 V的中国电机需核验能否在400 V下运行；虽然IEC容差范围可能覆盖此偏差，南非买家和NRCS审核方通常期望铭牌额定400 V或有文件记录的核验证明。仅标注380 V铭牌的电机可能面临NRCS LoA复杂情况或买家拒绝。重新额定为400 V（如380–420 V双电压范围）是常见的商业解决方案。
gap.zht: 50 Hz頻率完全一致，無頻率差距。但額定380 V的中國電機需核驗能否在400 V下運行；雖然IEC容差範圍可能覆蓋此偏差，南非買家和NRCS審核方通常期望銘牌額定400 V或有文件記錄的核驗證明。僅標注380 V銘牌的電機可能面臨NRCS LoA複雜情況或買家拒絕。重新額定為400 V（如380–420 V雙電壓範圍）是常見的商業解決方案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — motors placed on South African market must be rated and documented for 400 V / 50 Hz grid; NERSA governs grid compliance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sale — GB 755-2019 ratings at 380 V / 50 Hz; no export re-rating requirement under Chinese law

source.publisher: National Energy Regulator of South Africa (NERSA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese motor rated 380 V may operate within IEC voltage tolerance at South Africa's 400 V grid, but South African buyers and NRCS assessors typically expect 400 V nameplate rating. Re-rating to 400 V or confirming dual-voltage 380–420 V suitability with documented SANS 60034-1 evidence is the advisable export preparation step. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 额定380 V的中国电机在南非400 V电网下运行可能处于IEC电压容差范围内，但南非买家和NRCS审核方通常期望铭牌标注400 V。建议出口准备步骤为重新额定至400 V，或以SANS 60034-1文件证明适合380–420 V双电压范围。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 額定380 V的中國電機在南非400 V電網下運行可能處於IEC電壓容差範圍內，但南非買家和NRCS審核方通常期望銘牌標注400 V。建議出口準備步驟為重新額定至400 V，或以SANS 60034-1文件證明適合380–420 V雙電壓範圍。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
